channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: TI stock rallies as company cites industrial and data-center demand
Economic calendar: Jobless claims and manufacturing data
SK Hynix CFO says demand to outstrip supply for at least three years
Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill any boat' laying mines in Hormuz Strait
item.description: President Donald Trump said he has ordered the U.S. Navy "to shoot and kill any boat" that is laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Why it’s the luckiest U.S. stock market in history, according to one strategist
U.S. Senate votes to advance $70 billion funding plan for ICE, Border Patrol
item.description: U.S. Senate Republicans voted on Thursday to advance a $70 billion plan ⁠to fund the Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol agencies.

item.title: Stocks open lower as S&P 500 retreats from record amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
Trump's lack of focus on economy is spooking Republicans as 2026 election looms
item.description: President Donald Trump has been posting a lot on social media about his White House ballroom, the Iran war, and Pope Leo XIV. Not much about rising ga...

item.title: Kalshi suspends, fines 3 congressional candidates in 'insider trading' enforcement actions
item.description: The incidents involved a candidate from Virginia seeking a Senate seat and candidates running for House seats from Minnesota and Texas.

item.title: Pirro says DOJ won't drop Fed probe, will appeal judge's order blocking Powell subpoenas
item.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of targeting him for refusing to obey Trump's demand that the Fed sharply lower interest rates.
